message:
fix(runtime): Consistent __len__ validation between len() and bool()

- Add validateLen helper to type_builtins.zig to validate __len__() >= 0
- Update len() codegen to use validateLen for user-defined classes
- Fix str(PyException) to return just message, not full struct fields

This fixes test_sane_len which expects bool() and len() to produce
identical exception messages when __len__ returns invalid values.

test_bool: 37/38 → 38/38
@core1: 18/65 → 19/65
